Short Description Text About Yourself:
Jacob Abiodun is an engineer, entrepreneur, and sustainability advocate. He holds a degree in Mechanical Engineering from the Federal University of Technology Akure (FUTA), where he developed a strong interest in engineering innovation and technology-driven solutions for societal challenges.

During his academic journey, Jacob combined engineering knowledge with practical problem-solving, leading him to explore opportunities within agriculture and sustainable development. This passion inspired him to establish Coconoto Limited, an Agritech and circular economy company focused on transforming the coconut value chain through innovative processing technologies and waste-to-value solutions.

Designing the future of agritech hardware through end-to-end 3D CAD development, parametric modeling, and assembly verification. I bridge virtual engineering with practical fabrication to build COCONOTO's patent-backed, high-efficiency industrial processing machinery.
